description: Product Description Why Choose Our Tovee Wing Corkscrew ? Our premium corkscrew can open wine and cap,very convenient Upgraded steel material ,very durable and not corrosion Come with Ergonomic handle,make it easier to open the wine Wing handle with rubber cover,easy to grap With mechanical geal,fix the screw on the cork and open wine bottles with ease Sharp edged screw,not easy to break and keep it from crumbling Wing Handle Design With ergonomic grip and anti-slip handle,comfortable to grip and no more effort to open the bottle All in One Bottle Opener Built-in bottle opener,multifunctional design ,fit both wine and bottle,which bring you more convenience Hard and Sharp-edge Corkscrew This screw is made of hard and sharp zinc alloy,which can insert the central of cork and avoid crumbling efficiently
